name: get_run
description: Poll a run started by start_run. Returns status (queued|running|succeeded|failed|canceled) plus error info. On success, adds previewUrl (open it in a browser to view the rendered design) and agentMessage (the inner agent's textual output reassembled from the event stream — show this when there is no previewUrl, e.g. when the agent asked the user a clarifying question instead of producing files).
